name: @kp/rubrics-as-rewards-llm-graded-structured-rubrics-as
description: In scope: reinforcement learning methods that replace or augment verifiable rewards (RLVR) with structured, multi-criterion rubrics graded by an LLM judge as the dense reward for open-ended/subjective tasks (writing, dialogue, medicine, reasoning quality) — covering the original "Rubrics as Rewards
